calendar.matters: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication (Judgments)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Continued To Sep-08-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two

Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Marco Ahzi Moxquuz And Request For Sanctions For Misuse Of The Discovery Process
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FCA US LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF MARCO AHZI MOXQUUZ AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FOR MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS

Appearances via Zoom:
Saed Atallah of Evans Fears SChuttert McNulty Mickus (949.237.7492, satallah@efsmmlaw.com) for defendant and moving party;
No other appearances.

The court did not receive notification that the tentative ruling is contested. This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to compel plaintiff's deposition is granted. Plaintiff shall sit for deposition by April 9, 2026. Although plaintiff has now provided dates, his repeated failure to provide dates in response to reasonable requests lacked substantial justification. The dates he has provided are beyond the discovery cutoff based on the July 27, 2026 trial date. The court orders plaintiff and his counsel to pay $2060 in sanctions to defendant within 30 days of this order. The court awards the sanctions jointly and severally against counsel because it appears that it was counsel's failure to meet and confer about deposition dates that constituted misuse of the discovery process. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Marco Ahzi Moxquuz And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Counsel For Misuse Of The Discovery Process
